name: beui-overflow-actions
title: Overflow Actions
author: Saurabh Chauhan
description: Reveals secondary caller-provided actions from a measured connected action rail.

changes: Changed project aliases to bundled relative imports.
Required an accessible label for each supplied action and retained a string-label fallback.
Changed exit positioning from physical left to logical inline start for RTL and added Escape collapse with toggle focus restoration.
Moved overflow blur interpolation off the layout spring to prevent invalid negative blur values.

modifications.change: Repointed shared imports and completed action naming, RTL positioning, Escape behavior, and bounded blur interpolation.
modifications.reason: Keep the copied rail portable and preserve equivalent keyboard and layout behavior across writing directions.
